docket_entries.description: JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. ASSIGNED TO CREDITORS SPECIALTY SERVICE, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-23-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-23-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT.
